series_metadata.series_description: File contains a manual showing various tasks that can be performed by the Operating section of ISS for the Departemnt of Commerce's divisions.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy records until the system 38 is no longer being used in the department of Commerce, or until all the equipment that is being used to retrieve information from the System 38 is no longer being used for that purpose, then transfer to Archives., Paper: Archives
